codeReview.summary: Notification Center behavior is functionally complete across list/detail, SSE merge, mark-as-read, unread filter toggle, and API wiring, including follow-up fixes in commits a743a0a and 0463955. No blocking correctness issues were found.

issues.description: Search results are re-filtered client-side using simple substring matching after server FTS5 search results are fetched. This can drop valid FTS5 matches (e.g., wildcard/operator queries like `meet*`) that do not literally contain the raw query string.

sharedStateObservations.observation: Mission AGENTS guidance states backend/API should remain unchanged, but this feature required backend edits to satisfy search and mark-all-read behavior.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: /Users/teodorwaltervido/.factory/missions/aba4091c-f606-4117-af40-1e9c221d196b/AGENTS.md:8,136-141; commits 092df07 and a743a0a modify src/api/admin.ts and src/gateway/notification-store.ts

sharedStateObservations.observation: Feature references `skillName: worker`, but no worker skill exists in project skills, causing workflow drift in transcript.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: features.json includes `"skillName": "worker"` for f-notification-center; /Users/teodorwaltervido/Desktop/service/.factory/skills is empty; worker handoff skillFeedback notes 'Skill worker not found'.

sharedStateObservations.observation: Expected shared architecture reference file is missing from project library, reducing reviewer guidance on component-boundary checks.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: /Users/teodorwaltervido/Desktop/service/.factory/library contains only user-testing.md; architecture.md not present.

summary: Pass. The feature meets expected Notification Center behavior across list/detail, SSE updates, mark-read/mark-all-read, and unread/search flows after follow-up fixes. One non-blocking search semantics issue remains in client-side post-filtering of server FTS results.
